title: [Bug]: CRASH ERROR in `oceanbase::sql::ObExprLike::record_last_check<true>`
description: build `master` branch with sanity, client lost connection after executing a SQL.
poc: CREATE RESOURCE UNIT 4c7g MAX_CPU 4, MIN_CPU 4, MEMORY_SIZE '7G';
create resource pool pool_test unit='4c7g', unit_num=1, zone_list=('zone1' ,'zone2', 'zone3');
create tenant test resource_pool_list=('pool_test'), primary_zone='RANDOM',comment 'test tenant', charset='utf8' set ob_tcp_invited_nodes='%', recyclebin=OFF;

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, age INT CHECK (age >= 0), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, age) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 30);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, age) VALUES (2, 'Bob', NULL);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE age IS NULL OR age < 25;
UPDATE test_table SET age = age + 1 WHERE id = 1;
